---
title: "PhastCons 20way Multiple Sequence Alignment Analysis"
author: "Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 14,
  fig.height = 10
)
```

# Load Libraries

```{r load-libraries}
library(ggmsa)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(Biostrings)
```

# Define File Paths

```{r define-paths}
# Base WSL path
base_wsl_path <- "\\\\wsl.localhost/Ubuntu/home/mikej10/advbfx"

# Directory containing extracted files
extracted_dir <- file.path(base_wsl_path, "intronretention", "extracted_regions")

# SRRM2 intron 12 FASTA file (RNA version with T converted to U)
srrm2_intron12_fasta <- file.path(extracted_dir, "SRRMI12full_RNA.fa")

# If RNA version doesn't exist, create it from the DNA version
if (!file.exists(srrm2_intron12_fasta)) {
  dna_fasta <- file.path(extracted_dir, "SRRMI12full.fa")
  if (file.exists(dna_fasta)) {
    # Read DNA FASTA and convert T to U
    fasta_lines <- readLines(dna_fasta)
    rna_lines <- gsub("T", "U", fasta_lines)
    writeLines(rna_lines, srrm2_intron12_fasta)
    cat("Created RNA version:", srrm2_intron12_fasta, "\n")
  }
}
```

# SRRM2 Intron 12 Multiple Sequence Alignment

## Basic Alignment View

```{r srrm2-intron12-alignment-basic, fig.height=8}
# SRRM2 intron 12: chr16:2,770,200-2,770,239
if (file.exists(srrm2_intron12_fasta) && file.info(srrm2_intron12_fasta)$size > 0) {
  cat("Creating multiple sequence alignment for SRRM2 intron 12\n")
  cat("Region: chr16:2,770,200-2,770,239\n")
  cat("Using FASTA file:", srrm2_intron12_fasta, "\n")

  tryCatch(
    {
      srrm2_intron12_msa <- ggmsa(
        srrm2_intron12_fasta,
        char_width = 0.5,
        seq_name = TRUE,
        consensus_views = TRUE
      )
      print(srrm2_intron12_msa)
    },
    error = function(e) {
      cat("Error creating SRRM2 intron 12 alignment:", e$message, "\n")
    }
  )
} else {
  cat("Warning: SRRM2 intron 12 FASTA file not found at", srrm2_intron12_fasta, "\n")
}
```

## Alignment with Highlighted Regions (Positions 10-14 and 28-32)

```{r srrm2-intron12-alignment-highlighted, fig.height=8}
# Highlight positions 10-14 and 28-32 (moved right by 1, extended right by 3)
if (file.exists(srrm2_intron12_fasta) && file.info(srrm2_intron12_fasta)$size > 0) {
  cat("Creating alignment with highlighted regions\n")
  cat("Highlighting positions: 10-14 and 28-32\n")

  tryCatch(
    {
      # Create base alignment
      p <- ggmsa(
        srrm2_intron12_fasta,
        char_width = 0.6,
        seq_name = TRUE,
        consensus_views = TRUE,
        color = "Chemistry_NT"
      )

      # Get the number of sequences
      seq_data <- readLines(srrm2_intron12_fasta)
      seq_count <- sum(grepl("^>", seq_data))

      # Add highlighting rectangles (moved right by 1, extended right by 3)
      # Original: 9-11 -> New: 10-14 (moved right 1, extended right 3)
      # Original: 27-29 -> New: 28-32 (moved right 1, extended right 3)
      p <- p +
        annotate("rect",
          xmin = 10 - 0.5, xmax = 15 + 0.5,
          ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
          alpha = 0.2, fill = "yellow", color = "orange", linewidth = 0.8
        ) +
        annotate("rect",
          xmin = 28 - 0.5, xmax = 33 + 0.5,
          ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
          alpha = 0.2, fill = "cyan", color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8
        ) +
        annotate("text",
          x = 12.5, y = seq_count, label = "209-214",
          color = "darkorange", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
        ) +
        annotate("text",
          x = 30.5, y = seq_count, label = "227-232",
          color = "darkblue", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
        )

      print(p)
    },
    error = function(e) {
      cat("Error creating highlighted alignment:", e$message, "\n")
    }
  )
} else {
  cat("Warning: SRRM2 intron 12 FASTA file not found\n")
}
```

## 100-Way Alignment with Highlighted Regions (Positions 10-14 and 28-32)

```{r srrm2-intron12-100way-alignment-highlighted, fig.height=12}
# 100-way alignment with highlighted regions
# Use RNA version (with U instead of T)
srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta <- file.path(extracted_dir, "100waySRRMI12_RNA.fa")
srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta_dna <- file.path(extracted_dir, "100waySRRMI12.fa")

# Convert DNA to RNA if RNA version doesn't exist
if (!file.exists(srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta)) {
  if (file.exists(srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta_dna)) {
    # Read DNA FASTA and convert T to U
    cat("Converting DNA to RNA for 100-way alignment...\n")
    dna_lines <- readLines(srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta_dna)
    rna_lines <- gsub("T", "U", dna_lines)
    writeLines(rna_lines, srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta)
    cat("Created RNA version:", srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta, "\n")
  } else {
    # If DNA version doesn't exist either, use the original file name
    srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta <- srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta_dna
    cat("Using original file (may contain T's):", srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta, "\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Using existing RNA version:", srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta, "\n")
}

if (file.exists(srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta) && file.info(srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta)$size > 0) {
  tryCatch(
    {
      # Create base alignment
      p <- ggmsa(
        srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta,
        char_width = 0.6,
        seq_name = TRUE,
        consensus_views = TRUE,
        color = "Chemistry_NT"
      )

      # Get the number of sequences
      seq_data <- readLines(srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta)
      seq_count <- sum(grepl("^>", seq_data))

      cat("Number of sequences in 100-way alignment:", seq_count, "\n")

      # Add highlighting rectangles (same positions as 20-way)
      # Positions 10-14 and 28-32
      p <- p +
        annotate("rect",
          xmin = 10 - 0.5, xmax = 15 + 0.5,
          ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
          alpha = 0.2, fill = "yellow", color = "orange", linewidth = 0.8
        ) +
        annotate("rect",
          xmin = 28 - 0.5, xmax = 33 + 0.5,
          ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
          alpha = 0.2, fill = "cyan", color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8
        ) +
        annotate("text",
          x = 12.5, y = seq_count + 0.5, label = "208-213",
          color = "darkorange", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
        ) +
        annotate("text",
          x = 30.5, y = seq_count + 0.5, label = "226-231",
          color = "darkblue", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
        )

      print(p)
    },
    error = function(e) {
      cat("Error creating 100-way highlighted alignment:", e$message, "\n")
    }
  )
} else {
  cat("Warning: 100-way SRRM2 intron 12 FASTA file not found at", srrm2_intron12_100way_fasta, "\n")
}
```

## 100-Way 52nt Alignment with Highlighted Regions (Positions 10-14 and 40-44)

```{r srrm2-intron12-100way-52nt-alignment-highlighted, fig.height=12}
# 100-way 52nt alignment with highlighted regions
# Use RNA version (with U instead of T)
srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta <- file.path(extracted_dir, "100way52ntSRRMI12_RNA.fa")
srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta_dna <- file.path(extracted_dir, "100way52ntSRRMI12.fa")

# Convert DNA to RNA if RNA version doesn't exist
if (!file.exists(srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta)) {
  if (file.exists(srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta_dna)) {
    # Read DNA FASTA and convert T to U
    cat("Converting DNA to RNA for 100-way 52nt alignment...\n")
    dna_lines <- readLines(srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta_dna)
    rna_lines <- gsub("T", "U", dna_lines)
    writeLines(rna_lines, srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta)
    cat("Created RNA version:", srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta, "\n")
  } else {
    # If DNA version doesn't exist either, use the original file name
    srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta <- srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta_dna
    cat("Using original file (may contain T's):", srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta, "\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Using existing RNA version:", srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta, "\n")
}

if (file.exists(srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta) && file.info(srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta)$size > 0) {
  tryCatch(
    {
      # Create base alignment
      p <- ggmsa(
        srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta,
        char_width = 0.6,
        seq_name = TRUE,
        consensus_views = TRUE,
        color = "Chemistry_NT"
      )

      # Get the number of sequences
      seq_data <- readLines(srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta)
      seq_count <- sum(grepl("^>", seq_data))

      cat("Number of sequences in 100-way 52nt alignment:", seq_count, "\n")

      # Add highlighting rectangles
      # First highlight: positions 10-14 (unchanged)
      # Second highlight: positions 40-44 (moved right by 12 from 28-32: 28+12=40, 32+12=44)
      p <- p +
        annotate("rect",
          xmin = 10 - 0.5, xmax = 15 + 0.5,
          ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
          alpha = 0.2, fill = "yellow", color = "orange", linewidth = 0.8
        ) +
        annotate("rect",
          xmin = 40 - 0.5, xmax = 45 + 0.5,
          ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
          alpha = 0.2, fill = "cyan", color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8
        ) +
        annotate("text",
          x = 12.5, y = seq_count + 0.5, label = "208-213",
          color = "darkorange", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
        ) +
        annotate("text",
          x = 42.5, y = seq_count + 0.5, label = "238-243",
          color = "darkblue", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
        )

      print(p)
    },
    error = function(e) {
      cat("Error creating 100-way 52nt highlighted alignment:", e$message, "\n")
    }
  )
} else {
  cat("Warning: 100-way 52nt SRRM2 intron 12 FASTA file not found at", srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta, "\n")
}
```
